description: Compare the performance of Fixed Speed vs Variable Speed wind turbine control strategies using the 'HAWT_Review.wpa' project. For the 'Fixed_Turbine' configuration, use Fixed Rotational Speed at 30 RPM and run simulation 'Sim_Fixed' (3-25 m/s). For the 'Variable_Turbine' configuration, use Variable Rotational Speed (Optimized Cp) with a Design TSR of 7.0 and run simulation 'Sim_Variable' (3-25 m/s). Export the Power vs Wind Speed results, including Rotational Speed columns, for both simulations to /home/ga/Documents/fixed_power_curve.txt and /home/ga/Documents/variable_power_curve.txt.
